# 4. Structural Diagrams & Schematics

## 4.1 Block Diagram: The Investigation Workflow

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Incident Occurs] --> B[Emergency Response]
    B --> C[Life Safety Rescued]
    B --> D[Incident Stabilized]
    B --> E[Scene Secured]
    E --> F[Notification of Authorities]
    F --> G[Investigation Team Mobilized]
    G --> H[Evidence Collection]
    H --> H1[Physical Evidence]
    H --> H2[Documentary Evidence]
    H --> H3[Testimonial Evidence]
    H1 --> I[Timeline Reconstruction]
    H2 --> I
    H3 --> I
    I --> J[Root Cause Analysis]
    J --> J1[Five Why]
    J --> J2[Fault Tree]
    J --> J3[Bow Tie]
    J --> J4[Fishbone]
    J1 --> K[Identify Immediate Cause]
    J2 --> K
    J3 --> K
    J4 --> K
    K --> L[Identify Systemic Root Cause]
    L --> M[Develop Recommendations]
    M --> M1[Engineering Controls]
    M --> M2[Administrative Controls]
    M --> M3[Management System Fix]
    M1 --> N[Draft Investigation Report]
    M2 --> N
    M3 --> N
    N --> O[Senior Management Review]
    O --> P[CAPA Implementation]
    P --> Q[MOC Process Triggered]
    Q --> R[Verification Audit]
    R --> S[Closure and Lessons Learned Shared]
```

## 4.2 Diagram: The Swiss Cheese Model (Latent Failure Layers)

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    subgraph L1[Organizational Influences]
        A1[Budget Cuts]
        A2[Production Pressure]
    end
    subgraph L2[Unsafe Supervision]
        B1[Inadequate Training]
        B2[Poor Permit Review]
    end
    subgraph L3[Preconditions for Unsafe Acts]
        C1[Fatigue]
        C2[Complacency]
    end
    subgraph L4[Unsafe Acts]
        D1[Bypassing Alarm]
        D2[Skipping Checklist]
    end
    E[ACCIDENT EVENT]
    A1 --> B1
    A2 --> B2
    B1 --> C1
    B2 --> C2
    C1 --> D1
    C2 --> D2
    D1 --> E
    D2 --> E
```

## 4.3 Diagram: Hierarchy of Controls (Recommendation Logic)

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    R0[Recommendation Identified] --> R1{Is Elimination Possible?}
    R1 -- Yes --> RC1[Eliminate the Hazard]
    R1 -- No --> R2{Substitution Feasible?}
    R2 -- Yes --> RC2[Replace with Less Hazardous Material]
    R2 -- No --> R3{Engineering Control Possible?}
    R3 -- Yes --> RC3[Add SIS Interlock / Relief / Ventilation]
    R3 -- No --> R4{Administrative Control Possible?}
    R4 -- Yes --> RC4[Revise SOP, Training, Signage]
    R4 -- No --> R5[PPE as Last Resort]
    style RC1 fill:#1B5E20,color:#fff
    style RC2 fill:#388E3C,color:#fff
    style RC3 fill:#FBC02D
    style RC4 fill:#FB8C00
    style R5 fill:#C62828,color:#fff
```

## 4.4 Diagram: Fault Tree Structure (Top-Down Logic)

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    TOP[Top Event: Pump Destruction] --> G1[AND Gate]
    G1 --> EV1[Event A: High Bearing Temp]
    G1 --> EV2[Event B: Low Cooling Flow]
    G1 --> EV3[Event C: Vibration Bypass]
    EV1 --> B1[Basic Cause: Sensor Fail]
    EV1 --> B2[Basic Cause: Lubrication Lost]
    EV2 --> B3[Basic Cause: Pump CW Strainer Choked]
    EV3 --> B4[Basic Cause: Sensor Underspecified]
    EV3 --> B5[Basic Cause: Maintenance Override]
```

## 4.5 Diagram: Bow-Tie Model (Cause and Consequence View)

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    H1[Hazard: Hydrocarbon in Pipe] --> T[Top Event: Pipe Rupture]
    T --> C1[Consequence 1: Fire]
    T --> C2[Consequence 2: Explosion]
    T --> C3[Consequence 3: Toxic Exposure]
    P1[Threat 1: Corrosion] --> T
    P2[Threat 2: Overpressure] --> T
    P3[Threat 3: Mechanical Impact] --> T
    SP1[Preventive Barrier: Material Spec] -.-> P1
    SP2[Preventive Barrier: PSV] -.-> P2
    SP3[Preventive Barrier: Layout] -.-> P3
    SC1[Mitigation Barrier: Foam System] -.-> C1
    SC2[Mitigation Barrier: Blast Wall] -.-> C2
    SC3[Mitigation Barrier: PPE] -.-> C3
```

## 4.6 Diagram: Investigator Skill Mix

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    TM[Investigation Team Lead] --> O1[Operations Expert]
    TM --> O2[Process Engineer]
    TM --> O3[Instrument and Control Engineer]
    TM --> O4[Maintenance Lead]
    TM --> O5[HSE Specialist]
    TM --> O6[Human Factors Specialist]

    TM --> O8[HR Representative]
    TM --> O9[Contractor Representative]
```
